failure_reason: Anonymous meeting traces could answer when, how long, and which surfaces, but did not expose a compact meeting shape useful for same-browser continuity. This task adds entry surface, surface sequence, page count, duration bucket, hostname-only referrer domains, and client start/end timestamps while keeping cross-device matching, IP address, geolocation, user agent, raw local keys, and full referrer URLs out of scope. The fresh web test first found missing installed dependencies; npm ci resolved it. The first local verifier run hit the known automation_usage warmup timing threshold; rerun passed. Local PR guard passed with ready_for_push=True and stale PR follow-through found zero stale Codex PRs.
